titel: The European Commission will disburse 846 million euros to Spain to support the recovery efforts following the floods in the Valencia region in 2024.
html:
European Commission Press Release, Brussels, June 24, 2026.

The European Commission has approved the disbursement of €846 million to Spain from the European Solidarity Fund (ESF) to support the reconstruction efforts following the devastating floods that affected the Valencia region in October 2024.
tldr: The European Union is providing €846 million to Spain to help rebuild the Valencia region following the major floods of 2024.
lattlast:
The European Commission, the highest authority of the EU, has approved the allocation of funds to Spain. This represents a significant amount: 846 million euros.

The funds are coming from a special fund called the EU Solidarity Fund. This fund is used to provide extra assistance to countries that have been hit by major disasters and need help to recover.

The purpose of the funds is to support the reconstruction efforts in the Valencia region. The area was severely affected by floods in October 2024.

This decision means that Spain will receive financial support to repair the damage caused by the natural disaster.
